name: Ham Black Bean
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked rice (cooled to room temperature)
2 cups Canned black beans (rinsed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, onion, jicama, olives, and peppers in a large bowl; set aside.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add ham; cook 2 to 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Add ham mixture to the rice mixture.
4. In a small jar with lid, combine remaining olive oil, vinegar, garlic, cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper. Shake to blend.
5. Drizzle dressing over salad.
